title: What are Arael and Leliel respective modes of attack
display_title: What are Arael and Leliel respective modes of attack
wikitext:
[]: What are Arael & Leliel respective modes of attack?             Quote Post by TraxXavier » Sun Dec 13, 2015 3:55 am What are Arael & Leliel respective modes of attack? Yes, Yes I know of cause mental contact and a all swallowing shadow. But thats kind of useless to be honest, so if NERV would just stand down and do nothing, would they be a threat, how would they proceed to try to make contact with lilith/adam.

[]: Re: What are Arael & Leliel respective modes of attack?             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Dec 13, 2015 4:12 am Just because that's all we see them do doesn't mean that's all they CAN do.

[]: Re: What are Arael & Leliel respective modes of attack?             Quote Post by TraxXavier » Sun Dec 13, 2015 4:50 am NemZ wrote: Just because that's all we see them do doesn't mean that's all they CAN do.

[]: Re: What are Arael & Leliel respective modes of attack?             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Sun Dec 13, 2015 5:47 am TraxXavier wrote: Well sure, but are there any theories around what they could do?

[]: Re: What are Arael & Leliel respective modes of attack?             Quote Post by TraxXavier » Sun Dec 13, 2015 6:20 am Yea Arael somewhat a conundrum, I would imagine it using also other kinds of energy beams like the crystalline angel probably.

[]: Re: What are Arael & Leliel respective modes of attack?             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 13, 2015 11:27 am Here's the Proposal version of Arael, wherein its "greatest weapons are the high-frequency swords on its wing-tips". Maybe Leliel could projectile-fire whatever it's sucked up back at enemies? :3

[]: Re: What are Arael & Leliel respective modes of attack?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Mon Dec 14, 2015 5:35 pm That's how Leliel fights in Battle Orchestra! The zebra-ball shoots out buildings, tanks, various debris and Pen-pen. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: What are Arael & Leliel respective modes of attack?             Quote Post by Chuckman » Mon Dec 14, 2015 6:24 pm Why would they need an attack beyond what they were already doing?

[]: Re: What are Arael & Leliel respective modes of attack?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Dec 14, 2015 6:31 pm If the angels' aim is to reach Adam or Lilith (let's just be confused her, shall we?), then how do these two propose to do that?

[]: Re: What are Arael & Leliel respective modes of attack?             Quote Post by Tankred » Mon Dec 14, 2015 6:34 pm pwhodges wrote: If the angels' aim is to reach Adam or Lilith (let's just be confused her, shall we?), then how do these two propose to do that?

[]: Re: What are Arael & Leliel respective modes of attack?             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Dec 14, 2015 6:58 pm Arael could potentially mindrape everyone in the area into a coma and then just cruise on down unopposed. Surely it can crossplosion it's way through the geofront like so many other angels can as a general-purpose ability. Lilliel can apparently warp in and out of spacetime at will, so maybe it warps into things and back out, cutting thin slices out of the middle in the process.

[]: Re: What are Arael & Leliel respective modes of attack?             Quote Post by Bagheera » Mon Dec 14, 2015 7:51 pm pwhodges wrote: If the angels' aim is to reach Adam or Lilith (let's just be confused her, shall we?), then how do these two propose to do that?

[]: Re: What are Arael & Leliel respective modes of attack?             Quote Post by IronEvangelion » Mon Dec 14, 2015 8:23 pm Arael's plan was probably to wreck the minds of all the eva pilots, then use its orbital speed to initiate a kinetic bombardment of the GeoFront, in effect smashing its way into Terminal Dogma like a meteor and slamming into Lilith. Leliel could have just kept absorbing everything until it absorbed Lilith.

[]: Re: What are Arael & Leliel respective modes of attack?             Quote Post by TraxXavier » Tue Dec 15, 2015 3:28 am BlueBasilisk wrote: That's how Leliel fights in Battle Orchestra! The zebra-ball shoots out buildings, tanks, various debris and Pen-pen. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: What are Arael & Leliel respective modes of attack?             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Dec 15, 2015 5:43 am This really brings up a couple of questions about Leliel. First and foremost, for me at least, pertains to how Leliel is able to get from point A to point B. In the show, it arrives in Tokyo-03 undetected and after Shinji shoots at the orb, the shadow suddenly appears beneath his Eva's feet. This is the only instance we see the Angel change positions, IIRC. Afterward it remains in place and simply expands. Can Leliel's main body, the shadow/dimensional sea weirdness, reduce itself to an undetectable size and move around freely? This also brings up the floating orb. How necessary is it? It first suddenly appears in the middle of Tokyo-03, and then seems to be able to disappear and reappear at whim. Since we see Unit-01 bust out of it, it's clear that through some dimensional weirdness it is connected to the main body, however it also doesn't seem to always need to be on display since the Angel probably went some time without it before its arrival in Tokyo-03. If this were the case, the only thing holding Leliel back from going straight to Terminal Dogma is simply the knowledge of how to get there and the intent to do it. It didn't even display Blood Type Blue until it actively began absorbing things, and so if it wanted to, it could probably make it all the way to Leliel before it began absorbing anything at all, and by then it would be too late. Thing is, like Bags pointed out, Leliel didn't seem to display any intent of reaching Lilith. Instead it swallowed a human and began trying to understand it, remaining in a single place for the duration of Unit-01's reserve power (16 hours, was it?). Perhaps this was some vague attempt on the Angel's part at figuring out a way to reach Lilith, but at the same time, perhaps the Angel was truly only curious about the human mind. Either way, we really don't know what the Leliel's goals were.

[]: Re: What are Arael & Leliel respective modes of attack?             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Tue Dec 15, 2015 7:43 am Those are some interesting points, it does make you wonder about the nature of the Angels themselves and their motives. We assume they're just trying to reach Lilith because that is what we're told. Beyond that we don't know what is driving them or if they have any thoughts and feelings on the matter. Could be that a number of them are drawn to it like it's some form of survival instinct, they're born with this inbuilt desire to return and will do so via any means. Could be that some have evolved beyond that to some other purpose, Leliel might not have a desire to return to Lilith and instead might want to try to understand the beings it shares the planet with.

[]: Re: What are Arael & Leliel respective modes of attack?             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Dec 15, 2015 11:55 am jcmoorehead wrote: Beyond that we don't know what is driving them or if they have any thoughts and feelings on the matter.

[]: Re: What are Arael & Leliel respective modes of attack?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Dec 15, 2015 12:13 pm That makes a lot of sense, actually, and also works well for Tabris/Kaworu, who maybe generalises this need for companionship and sees that there will be more of it around if the Lilin survive than otherwise - making another motive for his change of heart (discussed elsewhere). (Yes, I know that's a bit vague still as a motive, but I'm working on it...)
